embed.title: ## {username} is here!
embed.desc:
helloo i'm {username}, your all-in-one cutie bot 
i was born on `27/05/2022` and since then i've been growing with lots of lovee 

my amazing onii-chan is **kenndeclouv** >,<, you can dm them if you need help, wanna talk tech stuff, or even collab on something cool!

i love making your server more fun, organized, and cozy! from utilities to cute interactions, i'll always try to make things easier and sweeter for you ><

wanna invite me to your server or check out my website? just click the buttons below and letвҖҷs be friends!

embed.desc:
## {username} help you
рҹ‘Ӣ **Welcome to the bot help center!**

### рҹ”Һ Quick Tips:
вҖў Select a category below to see the command list and explanations.
вҖў Click a command name for more details (if available).
вҖў Use / in chat to auto-complete commands.

### рҹ“Ҡ **Statistics:**
вҖў Total categories: **{category_count}**
вҖў Total commands: **{command_count}**

### рҹҶҳ Need more help?
вҖў Join the support server: [Click here](https://dsc.gg/kythia)
вҖў Kythia's Website: [Click here](https://kythia.my.id)

-# вңЁ **Select a category below to see the help!**

welcome.desc:
## рҹҺү Thank you for inviting me!
Hello everyone! I'm **{bot}** and I'm ready to help your server!

Here are some steps to get started:
вҖў Use `/help` to see all my features and commands.
вҖў Configure your server settings with `/set view` (admin only).
вҖў Visit my website at [kythia.my.id](https://kythia.my.id/commands) for documentation and more info.

If you need help, just mention me or contact my owner `kenndeclouv`!
welcome.fallback:
## рҹҺү Thank you for inviting me!
Hello everyone! I'm **{bot}** and I'm ready to help your server!

Here are some steps to get started:
вҖў Use `/help` to see all my features and commands.
вҖў Configure your server settings with `/set view` (admin only).
вҖў Visit my website at [kythia.my.id](https://kythia.my.id/commands) for documentation and more info.

If you need help, just mention me or contact my owner `kenndeclouv`!
